description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat and partially gabled roof, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several trees. The structure features a mix of large windows and solid wall sections, with a prominent driveway leading to a garage on one side. The front of the house includes a covered porch area and a swimming pool adjacent to the main entrance. Outdoor furniture and a car are visible, suggesting a suburban residential setting. The rear of the house has a more private garden area with additional seating. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a garage, a pool, and landscaped gardens, blending contemporary architecture with outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, pool, driveway, and garage with visible landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway with a parked car, and the rear garden area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, two lounge chairs, and the solid wall with several windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled roof section, additional garden space, and the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, wide steps, and a modern door with an overhang.
